---
title: Consultancy Services
format: html
css: styles.css
---

**Dr. Declan King provides stategic advisory services to pharmaceutical, biotech, academic and longevity-focused ventures. **

**Leveraging 20+ years of research leadership, he provides guidance on biomarker integration, translational neuroscience and brain ageing research. **

*Engagements are tailored to project scope and technical complexity.*

**Areas of Engagement:**

:::::: services-container
::: service-card
### Translational Biomarker Strategy

Guidance on the selection and interpretation of synaptic biomarkers. Helps teams incorporate biomarker science into early-stage research planning and decision-making.
:::

::: service-card
### Synaptic Resilience & Brain Ageing

Advisory on research programs investigating synaptic preservation and cognitive resilience. Bridges post-mortem molecular data with in-vivo imaging insights to support evidence-based study design.
:::

::: service-card
### Scientific Advisory & Peer Review

Expert input on research planning, study methodology and publication strategy. Draws on 20+ years of academic and industry-facing experience.
:::
::::::

<p class="services-note">

**Ready to discuss your project?**  

**Contact Dr. Declan King** to explore a tailored advisory engagement.

**Professional Disclaimer:** Dr. Declan King provides strategic neuroscience consultancy and research advisory services only. All insights and deliverables are intended for informational and research purposes and **do not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.** Engagement terms and investment are determined by project scope and technical complexity.

</p>
